title: 3 Sectors That Could Drive India’s Next Market Rally
description:
Three sectors could fuel this next leg of India’s market growth.
Goldman Sachs just upgraded India back to Overweight and expects Nifty to hit 29,000 by 2026, driven by stronger policy support, earnings recovery, and improving foreign sentiment up. If you're investing for 2025–26, these themes matter.
